prompt: Turn these notes into a blog post about setting up Tailwind CSS in Next.js 15

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese (blog-post-vi.md) and English (blog-post-en.md) files are created

assertions.name: guide_style_used
assertions.description: Uses guide/tutorial style with numbered sections (Phần/Part 1, 2, etc.)

assertions.name: has_code_examples
assertions.description: Contains multiple code examples with proper syntax highlighting

assertions.name: has_comparison_table
assertions.description: Includes at least one comparison or reference table

assertions.name: covers_all_points
assertions.description: Covers all points from input: install, config, directives, dark mode, prettier, gotchas

assertions.name: proper_structure
assertions.description: Has title, subtitle/context, main sections, and conclusion

assertions.name: vietnamese_terms
assertions.description: Vietnamese version uses appropriate Vietnamese technical terms mixed with English where standard
